evidence_id.description: Stable local identifier for a claim-level evidence record.

claim.description: Short paraphrased claim. Do not store long verbatim text.

citation_keys.description: Keys from core_references.csv. Empty only for workflow-design records.

source_files.description: Local research-note source IDs from source_inventory.csv.

recommended_use.description: Where the claim may be used: background, methods, review question, or not for citation.

requires_skill.description: Skill names required before this claim can support a result.

review_required.description: True when the claim should be checked by a scientific review agent before manuscript use.

excluded_from_default.description: True for records that may guide searching but should not be indexed as evidence.
